flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Fresno City College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fresno City College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($508 → $658).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fresno City College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fresno City College fell 15% between 2009 and 2010 (7.2% → 6.1%).
